payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Dark brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular central panel and visible vertical wood grain; smooth satin finish with subtle light reflection; mostly fully visible but slightly cropped at the sides and with a small metallic/cloth occlusion near the top-left; estimated distance about 0.8 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"dark brown recessed cabinet door","long_description":"Dark brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular central panel and visible vertical wood grain; smooth satin finish with subtle light reflection; mostly fully visible but slightly cropped at the sides and with a small metallic/cloth occlusion near the top-left; estimated distance about 0.8 m from the camera.","attributes":["dark brown wood","recessed central panel","vertical wood grain","smooth satin finish","subtle reflection","vertical rectangular shape","slight side cropping","small top-left occlusion"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.8}
